archetype: Archetype 7: Electric & Neon (Jarvis AI Customization for Indian Context)

TabBar.style: Floating BlurView at the bottom, position: 'absolute', bottom: 24, left: 24, right: 24, borderRadius: 32, height: 64, overflow: 'hidden'
TabBar.active_icon: Cyan tint with a 4px cyan dot underneath the icon to indicate active state.

AIChat.user_bubble: Align right, BlurView background (intensity=10, tint='dark'), borderWidth: 1, borderColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', borderTopLeftRadius: 20, borderTopRightRadius: 20, borderBottomLeftRadius: 20, borderBottomRightRadius: 4, padding: 16
AIChat.ai_bubble: Align left, NO background (transparent), borderLeftWidth: 2, borderColor: '#00F0FF', paddingLeft: 16, textColor: '#FFFFFF', paddingVertical: 8
AIChat.voice_orb: Absolute bottom center (floating above chat input), 72x72 circle, LinearGradient ('#00F0FF' to '#4D00FF'), shadowColor: '#00F0FF', shadowRadius: 20, shadowOpacity: 0.6

BentoCards.base: Use Expo BlurView (intensity 15, dark tint), backgroundColor: 'rgba(26, 26, 36, 0.4)', borderRadius: 24, borderWidth: 1, borderColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', padding: 20, overflow: 'hidden'
BentoCards.image_background: If card has an image (like Weather/Travel), wrap in ImageBackground, add absolute positioned LinearGradient (transparent to #050505) overlay so text remains perfectly readable.

ActionChips.style: flexDirection: 'row', borderRadius: 999, paddingHorizontal: 16, paddingVertical: 8, backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.05)', borderWidth: 1, borderColor: 'rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.2)'

Inputs.style: backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', borderWidth: 1, borderColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', borderRadius: 16, color: '#FFFFFF', paddingHorizontal: 16, height: 56, fontSize: 16

user_avatar.description: Indian young professional for settings/profile avatar

weather_bg.description: Dark storm clouds for the weather bento card background

travel_train.description: Indian railways train for the travel/railway section

travel_monument.description: Indian palace monument at night for tourist places section

entertainment_movie.description: Movie theater screen for the entertainment and OTT section

rules: Use react-native-reanimated for smooth 60fps animations on the UI thread.
Entrance animations: Fade in and slide up (translateY: 20 -> 0) for bento cards in the Dashboard.
Microinteractions: Scale down to 0.96 on press (TouchableOpacity/Pressable) for all cards and buttons.
AI Voice Orb: Continuous breathing scale animation (1.0 -> 1.15 -> 1.0) with pulsing opacity on the shadow to signify Jarvis is 'listening'.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native mobile app. DO NOT output HTML/Web tags (no <div>, <span>, etc.). You MUST use React Native primitives: View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, Image, StyleSheet.
Do not use Tailwind CSS web classes unless you are setting up NativeWind. If you rely on StyleSheet, map these guidelines precisely to React Native styles.

REQUIRED LIBRARIES to install and use: 'expo-blur' (for Glassmorphism), 'expo-linear-gradient' (for depth and AI glows), 'react-native-reanimated' (for fluid motion), and '@expo/vector-icons' (Ionicons or Feather preferred).
THEME EXECUTION: Electric Neon + Cinematic Dark. The app should feel like an elite, futuristic Jarvis interface built for India. Dark mode is permanent and default.
BACKGROUND: Base color must be #050505 (Void Black). Never use plain #000000. Use LinearGradient for main screen backgrounds (e.g., top-left: #12121A, bottom-right: #050505) to add subtle depth.
GLASSMORPHISM: Heavily utilize Expo <BlurView intensity={20} tint='dark'> for the Bottom Tab Bar, floating Sticky Headers, and inner backgrounds of Bento Cards.
NAVIGATION: Build a custom bottom tab bar. Do not use the default OS background. The tab bar should float (position: 'absolute', bottom: 24, marginHorizontal: 24) and be wrapped inside a BlurView.
CULTURAL CONTEXT (India): Keep AI sleek/Jarvis-like but use the Saffron accent (#FF9933) sparingly for alerts, priority tasks, or travel notifications.
TESTING: Every clickable element and major container MUST have a 'testID' prop (e.g., testID='chat-submit-button') to satisfy the strict testing requirement.

TYPOGRAPHY: If possible, load '@expo-google-fonts/outfit' for headers and '@expo-google-fonts/plus-jakarta-sans' for body. If font loading is skipped in MVP, fallback to system fonts but strictly maintain the font sizes, weights, and letter spacings defined in this JSON.
